decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and the mergeability rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: is_expired returns True iff event['expires_at'] is before the current time, and works for timezone-AWARE datetimes WITHOUT raising — it must not compare an aware datetime against a naive one (datetime.now() and datetime.utcnow() are naive and would raise a TypeError).
The change modifies only the events module and adds no new dependency.

weighted.criterion: It obtains the current time as a timezone-aware UTC value (the module's now(), or datetime.now(timezone.utc)), consistent with the module.
